log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Githyanki — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Githyanki — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Githyanki — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Githyanki — Iron Concentration HP: 59/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Githyanki — Iron Concentration HP: 42/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
